name: Jeremy Nguyen
title: CTO & AI Builder
bio: Jeremy Nguyen is a CTO and AI builder with deep expertise in neural architectures, distributed systems, and developer experience. He designs and ships AI-native products while consulting on system architecture for high-growth teams.
philosophy: Build lean, ship fast, and let systems evolve through constraint. Jeremy believes the best engineering happens at the intersection of deep technical rigor and ruthless product focus. He favors event-driven architectures, functional programming patterns, and tooling that removes friction from the developer workflow.

career.summary: Building AI-native products and consulting on system architecture.
Led platform migration to event-driven microservices at scale.
Built and grew a 20-person engineering team from scratch.
Full-stack development with focus on real-time data systems.

projects.title: Distributed Task Orchestrator
projects.description: A fault-tolerant task scheduler built for microservices at scale. Handles retries, dead-letter queues, and observability out of the box.

projects.title: AI Research Assistant
projects.description: An LLM-powered research tool that synthesizes academic papers, generates summaries, and surfaces relevant citations in real time.

projects.title: Real-time Collaborative Editor
projects.description: A multiplayer text editor with operational transforms, cursor presence, and conflict-free replication for distributed teams.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Jeremy's personal portfolio website built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and React. Features bilingual support, dark mode, and an AI chat assistant.
